arts.sum: While Burnley will be boosted by the return of Hannibal for their midweek jaunt to Plymouth, Scott Parker doesn’t expect to have any others back.

arts.ttl: Promotion candidates consider offer for Burnley player – Loan with option to buy
arts.sum: According to a claim in the French media, Metz are showing interest in Burnley defender Hannes Delcroix. The 25-year-old has been snubbed by Scott Parker this season and could look to leave Turf Moor in this transfer window.
